name: the eval runner builds the dependency map and keys each spec's cache on its dependency hash, falling back to the whole-tree hash
command: R="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/runner.sh"; grep -q 'dep-hash.js' "$R" && grep -q 'DEPMAP' "$R" && grep -q 'dep_hash' "$R" && echo runner-keys-on-dep-hash 1>&2
